Our Story

A rooftop with a view and a soul

Perched above the vibrant lanes of Majnu Ka Tilla, Signature Cafe was built around one idea: great food shared under an open sky. The Signature Bridge glitters on the horizon and the Yamuna flows below — every visit feels like a small escape.

We cook across borders. From hand-folded momos and crispy dim sum to wood-fired pizzas and fresh sushi, every dish is made with passion and premium ingredients. Come for the view, stay for the tiramisu.

What people say

3,400+ reviews
One of Delhi's most-loved rooftop cafes
★★★★★

"Amazing experience, one of the most underrated cafes in MKT. Must try the pizza and the momos. The rooftop view of the Signature Bridge at night is absolutely magical."

Priya S.
Google Maps
★★★★★

"Their exotic veggie pizza and arrabiata pasta were so good. The dim sum platter is a must. Beautiful ambience, very polite staff. Will definitely come back with family."

Rahul M.
Google Maps
★★★★☆

"From crispy momos to melt-in-your-mouth tiramisu, every dish is crafted with love. The rooftop seating with the Signature Bridge in the background is a perfect date spot."

Anjali K.
Zomato
★★★★★

"The food portions are generous and quality is top notch. Go in the evening for the best experience with the bridge lit up. Cold coffee and the chocolate mud cake are excellent."

Vikram T.
Justdial
